item.title: It’s the Troll vs. the Bore in the G.O.P. Texas Senate Runoff
item.description: The state needs intelligent and responsible political leadership, but will it get it?

item.title: U.S. Struck Iranian Warship Off Sri Lanka, With Dozens Missing
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said a U.S. submarine torpedoed the ship on Wednesday. The Sri Lankan authorities said they had rescued 32 sailors from...

item.title: Talarico Beats Crockett as G.O.P. Heads to Runoff: Texas Primary Election Takeaways
item.description: James Talarico won the state’s Democratic primary for Senate, while Senator John Cornyn faces a runoff against Ken Paxton, his right-wing challenger.

item.title: 5 Minutes That Will Make You Love Ray Barretto
item.description: A son of Puerto Rican parents who grew up in the Bronx, Barretto moved between jazz and Latin music with relentless creativity. Hear 12 indestructible...

item.title: Trump’s ‘Worst Case’ Scenario in Iran, and the Most Expensive Primary in U.S. History
item.description: Plus, the fight over daylight saving time.
